name: VTSAX — Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund

provenance.source: Fidelity brokerage account — initial purchase confirmation 2022-01-15
provenance.author: grayson.culliford@hivefs.com

thesis_summary: VTSAX tracks the entire US stock market through ~3,700 companies. We hold this as our core defensive compounding position because it gives maximum diversification at near-zero cost (0.04% expense ratio). It will grow with the US economy over time and requires no active management. This is the ballast of the portfolio — it goes up over any 10-year window.
risk_factors: Short-term drawdowns of 30–50% are normal and expected — requires patience
US-concentration risk: does not cover international markets
Inflation can erode real returns if held in taxable account without rebalancing
